chapters.notes: Genealogy and birth narrative; genesis/birth language, David/Abraham framing, named women, Joseph/Mary, holy Spirit, Yeshua/save wordplay, Emmanuel/God-with-us.
Magi, Herod, star, Bethlehem/Micah, Egypt flight, Rachel lament, return to Nazareth, dream guidance and empire violence.
John the Baptist; metanoeite as turn/realign, reign of heavens, Jordan baptism, fruit worthy of realignment, Spirit/fire, Jesus baptism and beloved Son voice.
Wilderness testing, adversarial/testing language, scripture replies, realms/glory temptation, Galilee light citation, first disciples, teaching/proclamation/healing summary.

Sermon opening; makarioi as blessed/flourishing, righteousness/justice, Torah fulfillment, Gehenna preserved, reconciliation, desire/coveting, oaths, nonretaliation, enemy-love, teleios as complete/whole.
Mercy-giving, secret prayer, Lord's Prayer, debts/release, fasting, treasures, eye/lamp, Mammon, worry, birds/lilies, seeking divine reign and righteousness/justice.
Judging, measure, speck/beam, ask-seek-knock, golden rule, narrow gate, false prophets, fruit discernment, Lord/Lord warning, rock/sand houses, authority.
Cleansing and healings, centurion trust, authority under authority, Isaiah carried-weakness citation, discipleship cost, storm calming, Gadarene deliverance scene with careful spirit-language.
Forgiveness/release and healing, Matthew call, table fellowship, mercy not sacrifice, bridegroom/new wine, hemorrhaging woman, raised girl, blind/mute healings, compassion and harvest.
Mission discourse; twelve sent, freely received/freely give, hospitality, sheep among wolves, Spirit speech, endurance, fear not, Gehenna, sparrows, cross, psyche as life/soul.
John's question, Jesus' signs, Elijah motif, generation critique, woes to cities, hidden/revealed wisdom, Father/Son knowing, rest/yoke invitation.
Sabbath mercy, servant citation, Spirit controversy, tree/fruit, sign of Jonah, return of unclean spirit, and family redefined around doing the Father's will.
Parable discourse; sower, soils, Isaiah hearing, weeds/wheat, mustard seed, leaven, hidden treasure, pearl, net, age-completion, new-old treasure, Nazareth rejection.
Herod and John, Jesus' withdrawal, compassion, feeding five thousand, prayer mountain, walking on sea, ego eimi/I am, Peter, little trust, Gennesaret healings.

translation_notes: Greek metanoeite/metanoia should be rendered contextually as turn/realign/change consciousness rather than flattened to guilt-heavy repent.
Basileia ton ouranon should be handled as reign/realm of the heavens, not merely a distant place called heaven.
Gehenna should remain Gehenna with notes, not flattened into generic hell.
Aiōn language should be rendered age/era where context supports it, not world by default.
Dikaiosyne should be translated by context as justice/righteousness/right-relatedness rather than only moral legal status.
Jesus' teaching layer should preserve Jewish apocalyptic, wisdom, and Torah context while keeping mystical companion interpretation separate.
Matthew 4 adversarial language is rendered contextually as tester/adversarial one/adversary according to the scene, with Greek source hooks retained under the terms layer.

Matthew 5-7 preserves Sermon on the Mount as Jewish wisdom/Torah fulfillment teaching rather than anti-Torah replacement. Gehenna remains Gehenna, teleios is rendered complete/whole, and the Father's reign is practical earth-facing alignment.
Matthew 8-14 preserves sozo as saved/healed where the context bridges rescue and embodied healing, psyche as life/soul, aion as age, and ego eimi as I am in the sea-walking scene.
Spirit/deliverance passages use careful language: unclean spirits / troubling forces / spirit-language, avoiding over-importing later demonology while preserving the narrative function.
next_actions: Continue Matthew 15-21: purity debate, Canaanite woman, feedings, confession, transfiguration, community teaching, forgiveness, rich young man, laborers, Jerusalem entry, temple action, fig tree.

Add glossary entries for metanoia, basileia, ouranoi, Gehenna, aiōn, dikaiosyne, makarioi, pneuma, logos, euangelion, peirazo, diabolos, satanas, hamartia, teleios, mammon, epiousios, anomia, psyche, sozo, ego eimi, parabole, mysterion, and synteleia-aion.
